title: MIMYR: Generative modeling of missing tissue in spatial transcriptomics.
author: Deshpande A Bei Z Ma J Krieger S
content: S-EPMC12697367 PMC12697367 MIMYR: Generative modeling of missing tissue in spatial transcriptomics. Spatial transcriptomics enables the study of how gene expression is organized across tissues, revealing how cells interact within their native microenvironments in health and disease.
